meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding to boost retention and portfolio value using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To transition from basic CRUD apps to professional SaaS, you must master user onboarding. By implementing a guided, data-driven flow using Antigravity for state management and Claude Code for rapid iterative deployment, you eliminate friction, increase user retention, and build a portfolio-ready project that impresses recruiters and potential users alike.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks grinding out tutorials, but your app feels like a shell—empty, static, and devoid of life. The gap between a student project and a production-ready SaaS isn't the framework you choose; it’s the friction you remove the second a user hits your landing page. Without a clear path to 'Aha!', your users bounce before they ever see the value of your code.

Today, we stop building toys. We are architecting an onboarding flow that guides users to their first success state. By leveraging Antigravity for intelligent state orchestration and Claude Code to accelerate your implementation, you will transform your project from a static repository into a high-conversion, professional-grade product.

steps.title: Mapping the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact point where a user realizes your app's value. We define this as the 'North Star' of your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current app functionality and map out a 3-step onboarding flow that drives the user to the core 'Aha!' moment. Focus on minimizing cognitive load.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file flow_map.md --instruction 'Draft a user journey map focusing on the first 60 seconds of user interaction.'

steps.title: Architecting State with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to manage onboarding progress states, ensuring the user can pick up exactly where they left off if they navigate away.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine schema for user onboarding that tracks progress through 3 steps and persists to the database using an existing Prisma client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate the state machine logic and integrate it into the existing user profile database schema.'

steps.title: Building the UI Overlay
steps.description: Implement a non-intrusive, context-aware onboarding modal that highlights key features without cluttering the interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React component for a guided tour modal that fetches step configurations from the Antigravity state manager.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file components/OnboardingModal.tsx --instruction 'Create a high-performance, accessible modal component that respects the onboarding state.'

steps.title: Event-Driven Progress Tracking
steps.description: Trigger onboarding steps based on user behavior rather than static timers to ensure natural progression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write an event listener logic that triggers the next onboarding step only when the user completes a specific interaction like a button click or form save.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Implement event listeners that hook into the application lifecycle to advance the onboarding state.'

steps.title: Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Use Claude Code to simulate user sessions and identify friction points in the onboarding flow before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite for the onboarding flow that simulates a user abandoning the process halfway and returning to finish later.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test --instruction 'Run integration tests for the onboarding flow and report any state persistence failures.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing onboarding increases churn more than it increases retention.
Use progressive disclosure: only ask for complex user data once the user has seen the value of your app.
Instrument your onboarding flow with analytics events to see exactly which step causes users to drop off.
Keep your onboarding copy conversational; treat it like a helpful assistant, not a manual.
Implement a 'Progress Indicator' (like a step bar) to give users a psychological sense of completion.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy your project to Vercel or Railway and share it in our community Discord to get real feedback from senior engineers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn a simple app into a professional SaaS product. Don't just code—build with intent, measure your results, and iterate like a pro. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
